data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm that the scenario behavior of showing who approved is supported. The expected result states that the scenario should either confirm support or produce a clear failure report, but the current evidence does not demonstrate any successful validation of the audit trail for approvals. The linked use case mentions the need for full traceability, but there is no concrete evidence of the audit trail functionality being validated in this exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of successful validation of the audit trail showing who approved.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
